```dafny
function Canonicalize(x: Id): Id {
  Id(x.kind, x.value, if x.width < PAD then PAD else x.width)
}

lemma Spec(x: Id)
  requires Wellformed(x)
  ensures var c := Canonicalize(x); 
          c.kind == x.kind
  ensures var c := Canonicalize(x); 
          c.value == x.value
  ensures var c := Canonicalize(x); 
          c.width >= PAD
  ensures var c := Canonicalize(x); 
          Wellformed(c)
  ensures var c := Canonicalize(x); 
          (x.width >= PAD ==> c.width == x.width)
  ensures var c := Canonicalize(x); 
          (x.width < PAD ==> c.width == PAD)
{ }
```
